entries.name: Yaru
entries.description: Inbound executor in Hashi. It reconstructs message IDs, asks Hashi whether enough adapters agreed on the hash, and then calls the target bridge receiver.

HASHI.description: Hashi aggregator used to check whether the configured adapter threshold agreed on a message hash.

YAHO.description: Expected Yaho dispatcher address whose `MessageDispatched` events define valid message IDs for this Yaru instance.

SOURCE_CHAIN_ID.description: Source chain whose Yaho-dispatched messages this Yaru instance accepts.

receivedPermissions.description: change bridge limits, gas and confirmation parameters, and the optional Hashi validation manager for the xDAI bridge.
claim tokens held by the bridge and recover legacy transfers that remain locked in the contract.
change validator and Hashi-based message verification settings, chain identifiers, gas parameters, and reentrancy policy for AMB messages.
claim tokens accidentally held by the AMB bridge contract.
change the token implementation used for newly deployed Omnibridge wrapped tokens.
change the counterpart mediator, the AMB bridge endpoint, the wrapped token factory, gas settings, token pairs, and per-token bridge limits for Omnibridge transfers.
fix bridge imbalances and claim unsupported tokens or assets held by the mediator or bridged token contracts.
change the DAI and USDS bridge routes and recover ETH or ERC20 tokens locked in the router.
claim ETH or ERC20 tokens that remain stuck in the WETH Omnibridge router.
change the threshold and manage signers.

can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: XDaiForeignBridge
entries.description: Ethereum-side ERC20-to-native bridge used to lock DAI or USDS on Ethereum and authorize xDAI minting on Gnosis. Message execution is validated by a dedicated validator set and can additionally be gated by Hashi.

HASHI_IS_MANDATORY.description: If true, validator-approved bridge messages also require Hashi validation before execution.

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign xDAI bridge messages before they can be executed on Ethereum.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for xDAI bridge messages from Gnosis.

receivedPermissions.description: change the configured reporters, adapters, thresholds, Yaho or Yaru endpoints, and the remote target routing used for Hashi validation.
change the configured reporters, adapters, thresholds, Yaho or Yaru endpoints, and the remote target routing used for Hashi validation.

entries.name: ForeignAMB
entries.description: Ethereum-side Arbitrary Message Bridge endpoint that verifies validator signatures before relaying cross-chain calls to Gnosis. Hashi can be enabled as an additional verification layer.

HASHI_IS_MANDATORY.description: If true, validator-approved AMB messages also require Hashi validation before execution.

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign AMB bridge messages before they can be executed on Ethereum.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for AMB messages from Gnosis.

tokenImage.description: Template implementation cloned for newly deployed Omnibridge wrapped tokens.

entries.name: LayerZeroAdapter
entries.description: Hashi adapter that receives message-hash batches over LayerZero and stores them under the configured source chain for later Hashi aggregation.

LAYER_ZERO_ENDPOINT.description: LayerZero endpoint that is allowed to call `lzReceive` on this adapter.

entries.name: ForeignOmnibridge
entries.description: Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator used for arbitrary token transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis via the AMB bridge.

bridgeContract.description: AMB bridge endpoint used as the cross-chain messaging layer for the Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator.

requestGasLimit.description: Gas limit forwarded for Omnibridge message execution on Gnosis.

tokenFactory.description: Factory used to deploy wrapped tokens for assets bridged from Gnosis to Ethereum.

entries.name: ForeignAMB HashiManager
entries.description: Configuration contract that tells bridge contracts how to use Hashi as an additional message-validation layer.

targetAddress.description: Remote bridge contract whose messages are being validated through this HashiManager.

adapters.description: Remote adapter contracts whose stored hashes are aggregated by Hashi during message validation.

reporters.description: Reporter contracts used when forwarding Yaho-dispatched hashes toward the remote adapters. Some adapters use `address(0)` because they verify Yaho events directly.

threshold.description: Minimum number of adapters that must agree on a hash for Hashi validation to pass.

expectedThreshold.description: Expected adapter threshold encoded in incoming Hashi messages before the bridge accepts them.

expectedAdaptersHash.description: Keccak256 hash of the adapter set expected in incoming Hashi messages.

targetChainId.description: Chain ID of the remote chain whose messages this HashiManager validates.

yaho.description: Outbound Hashi dispatcher used to commit and relay message hashes from this chain.

yaru.description: Inbound Hashi executor used to consume validated message hashes on this chain.

entries.name: BridgeRouter
entries.description: Entry router for bridging between Ethereum and Gnosis. It routes DAI and USDS through the legacy xDAI bridge, ETH through the WETH Omnibridge router, and other ERC20 tokens through Omnibridge.

FOREIGN_XDAIBRIDGE.description: Legacy DAI or USDS bridge used for canonical stablecoin transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis.

FOREIGN_AMB.description: Ethereum-side Arbitrary Message Bridge endpoint used by the Gnosis bridge system for cross-chain calls.

FOREIGN_OMNIBRIDGE.description: Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator used for arbitrary token transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis.

WETH_OMNIBRIDGE_ROUTER.description: ETH-specific router that wraps ETH into WETH before sending it through Omnibridge.

entries.name: WETHOmnibridgeRouter
entries.description: Router that wraps native ETH into WETH before sending it through Omnibridge and unwraps it again on Gnosis when bridge messages are executed.

bridge.description: ForeignOmnibridge mediator used as the actual cross-chain bridge for ETH transfers.

entries.description: Hashi is an EVM hash oracle aggregator. It checks whether a configurable threshold of adapters agree on a block or message hash before downstream contracts accept that data.

entries.name: HomeBridgeErcToNative

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign xDAI bridge messages before they can be executed on Gnosis.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for xDAI bridge messages from Ethereum.
